title: pnpm Is Trending: Here's What Tools Developers Need to Know
description: pnpm is trending on GitHub with 114.0M new stars this week. Fast, disk space efficient package manager.

sourceData.name: pnpm
sourceData.description: Fast, disk space efficient package manager

bodyHtml:
pnpm is making waves in the Tools ecosystem this week, gaining 114.0MM weekly downloads. accruing over 35.7k stars on GitHub, this open-source project is rapidly becoming a go-to tool for developers worldwide.

⭐ 35.7kStars
📈 +114.0M/wkGrowth
🔀 1.5kForks
⚠️ 2.4kOpen Issues

Key Features

  • Written in JavaScript/TypeScript for maximum performance
  • Licensed under MIT — free to use and modify
  • Official website: https://pnpm.io
  • 🏷️ pnpm
  • 🏷️ pnpm11
  • 🏷️ dependencies
  • 🏷️ dependency manager
  • 🏷️ efficient

Why pnpm Is Trending

The Tools landscape is constantly evolving, and pnpm has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

  1. Growing community: With 114.0M new stars this week alone, developer adoption is accelerating rapidly.
  2. Active maintenance: The project sees regular updates, ensuring compatibility with the latest ecosystem changes.
  3. Practical utility: Fast, disk space efficient package manager

If you're working in Tools, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

Quick Start

Get started with pnpm in minutes:

# Clone the repository git clone https://www.npmjs.com/package/pnpm # Navigate to project cd pnpm # Check the README for detailed setup instructions

For full documentation and advanced usage, visit the official GitHub repository.

Final Thoughts

pnpm is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
